title: ASR Outdoor Multi Function Outdoor Travel Camping Utensil Set Knife Fork Spoon
description:
Get ready for your next meal on the go with the ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Multi Function Outdoor Utensil Set! This set includes a knife, fork, and a spoon that clip together for convenience. Perfect for any camping, backpacking, or other travel situations. Not only great for the outdoors, keep a set in your car, at the office, an emergency kit, or even in your pocket so you're ready to dine anytime!
